capabilities.referenceCapability: Search, batch search, engines, and pagination

verification.scenario: Invoke canonical search; the Bright adapter owns engine, locale, cursor, and upstream envelope mapping.

capabilities.referenceCapability: Markdown/HTML scrape and ordered batch scrape

verification.scenario: Scrape two URLs and verify format-independent input ordering plus private-network rejection.
A sampling-capable host returns Zod-validated data and provenance; an unsupported host receives an actionable per-page fallback.
Discover and describe the representative dataset, then collect known records in requested order.

capabilities.referenceCapability: Dataset fields and filtered record search

verification.scenario: Describe the typed search schema and execute a filtered canonical result.
Run the same logical dataset call synchronously and through an optional MCP task; upstream job IDs remain private.

verification.gate: bun run check:compat && bun run check:auth
verification.scenario: Read a result and continuation page, then prove another authenticated principal cannot read the artifact.

verification.gate: bun run build && bun run check:compat
verification.scenario: Resolve the table app resource while preserving the canonical structured result and text fallback.

capabilities.referenceCapability: Browser navigation, history, observation, and typed actions

verification.scenario: Navigate, observe, interact, use history, read a screenshot resource, and close an owned demo session.
List exactly five tools in the base profile and exactly nine in the opt-in browser profile.
Request IDs, attempts, durations, terminal states, and bounded session lifecycle stay operational rather than model-visible.

verification.gate: bun run scripts/brightdata-connection.ts help && bun run check:auth
verification.scenario: Local setup uses a Keychain prompt and read-only validation; hosted mode rejects global credentials and preserves the principal-bound provider boundary.
Keep guidance outside the model-visible server surface.

capabilities.exclusionReason: Guidance prompts are not Bright Data service capabilities and are optional in V1.
capabilities.userConsequence: The server does not offer prewritten strategy prompts; agents compose the typed tools directly.
